ModMetaData.name: Guns Galore - Supporter Suggestions Pack
ModMetaData.author: Chaingunfighter1 / Slippin' Jimmy
ModMetaData.description:
<size=24>Features</size>
100+ new weapons and 50+ additional variants, as decided by supporters and the Guns Galore Discord users, as well as myself. This pack will expand over time, so join the server (link in the workshop description) if you want to participate in the next poll.
Supporters: - emoney22b - feybeasts - Kazuki Hyena - Krig - MinionTrooper - Mojave - Raw227 - toastpuppy - Westheimer - Wing23
Collaborators/Additional Help: - Coutin - Grahammertek - Fonzawa - PunishedHunter - Tyrant_013X
